summary.text: Historical data is provided by S&P Global Market Intelligence. Real-time stock price data is provided by CBOE and 15-minute delayed consolidated tape pricing data is provided by Nasdaq UTP. Several fund data points are also provided by Finnhub.

overview.description: The Dimensional International Value ETF (DFIV) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in total market equity. The fund is an actively managed fund that provides exposure to stocks from developed markets, with an emphasis to large-caps, while minimizing federal taxes on performance returns. DFIV was launched on Apr 16, 1999 and is issued by Dimensional.

holdings.infoBox: DFIV is an equity ETF with a total of 603 individual holdings. The top holdings are Shell stock at 3.05%, Banco Santander at 1.93%, TotalEnergies SE at 1.91%, Toyota Motor at 1.72%, and HSBC Holdings PLC ADR at 1.25%.
